# tsuga_team (Resource)

Collection of users for managing ownership and access to resources


## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "tsuga_team" "team" {
  name        = "my-team-name"
  description = "My team description"
  visibility  = "public"
  tags = [
    {
      key   = "billing_center"
      value = "product"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name to assign to the team. Must be kebab-case (lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes only) and unique in the organization. Maximum length is 100 characters.
- `visibility` (String) `public` makes team-owned resources discoverable according to access controls. `private` restricts discovery to team members and authorized users.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional team description. Maximum length is 250 characters.
- `tags` (Attributes List) Key/value tags to apply to the resource. Up to 50 tags are accepted and tag policies may require specific keys or values. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the team. Generated by Tsuga and stable for the team lifetime.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `key` (String) Tag key to attach to the resource. Maximum length is 128 characters.
- `value` (String) Tag value to attach to the resource. Maximum length is 256 characters and leading or trailing whitespace is rejected.
